curation_notes: Primary location is osdp_reply_name in src/osdp_common.c, which the patch directly fixes by changing 'if (name[0] == '\0')' to 'if (!name)'. Sibling function osdp_cmd_name in the same file has the identical vulnerability pattern — a sparse names array indexed by command ID with the same missing null check before dereferencing. Pre-assigned class null-deref (CWE-476) is correct; the fix is a straightforward null pointer check.
